codex_cli.visual_capability_source: codex-cli default model (claude-sonnet-4-6 or equivalent multimodal)

available_visual_models.notes: Codex CLI default model is multimodal and supports direct image inspection. Suitable for all risk tiers.

high: character identity and expression consistency across 5 emotions
tile distinguishability at 128x128px (20 regular + 5 special must be fully distinct)
small-icon readability and silhouette recognition at 32x32px downscale
animation frame continuity (idle loop closure, wave motion progression)
style consistency across all 85 assets (same world, same palette)
medium: special block unique marker verification (no marker shared with regular tiles)
